# BYU Non-Collinear SPDC Digitization Template

Source: <https://physics.byu.edu/docs/thesis/103>

This template is reserved for documented values digitized from the reported
ring-diameter comparison. It contains no measurement values because no verified
table has been entered. This source uses different wavelengths from the default
405 nm / 810 nm BBO configuration and is treated as supplementary.
